name: Hijinx
description: Hijinx is the Mini version of the Undead Skylander, Hex in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: The Skylander Minis started off as regular 'Sidekicks,' assisting the Skylanders on many exciting adventures. And what they lacked in size they more than made up for in courage. Ultimately determined to become full-fledged heroes, they trained at the Skylands Academy - honing their powers and skills until they were ready. Now, they stand side by side with their full grown counterparts, ready to defend Skylands against Kaos and his evil minions.
personality: Hijinx has a reputation for being too serious and maybe a little creepy. But that's okay. She's too focused on her work to notice.

story.content: The Skylander Minis started off as regular 'Sidekicks,' assisting the Skylanders on many exciting adventures. And what they lacked in size they more than made up for in courage. Ultimately determined to become full-fledged heroes, they trained at the Skylands Academy - honing their powers and skills until they were ready. Now, they stand side by side with their full grown counterparts, ready to defend Skylands against Kaos and his evil minions.

trivia: Hijinx is the mini counterpart of Hex.
She was first released in Skylanders: Trap Team.
Her English voice actress is Courtenay Taylor.
Hijinx has a reputation for being too serious and maybe a little creepy.
The Skylander Minis were originally regular 'Sidekicks' before training at the Skylands Academy.
gameplay: Hijinx is the Mini version of the Undead Skylander, Hex in Skylanders: Trap Team. Hijinx features a kit identical to Hex, focusing on conjuring phantom orbs and raining skulls upon her enemies.

basic.name: Conjure Phantom Orb
basic.content: Conjure a Phantom Orb to attack enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Wall of Bones
basic_upgrades.content: Create a wall of bones for defense.

basic_upgrades.name: Long Distance Orbs
basic_upgrades.content: Attack from further away with phantom orbs.

soulgems.name: Compound Fracture
soulgems.content: A powerful upgrade for Hijinx's spectral abilities.
